addi $t1, $t1, 4              0x21290004  00100001001010010000000000000100
sw $t1, 4($t1)                0xAD290004  10101101001010010000000000000100
addi $t2, $t2, 4              0x214A0004  00100001010010100000000000000100
lw $t3, 0($t2)                0x8D4B0000  10001101010010110000000000000000
mul $t1, $t2, $t3             0x014B4818  00000001010010110100100000011000
sw $t1, 4($t3)                0xAD690004  10101101011010010000000000000100
